rows.label: qev031501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah... Aah...!
This is exactly as the legends foretold!
At this rate, a disaster will fall upon us...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Hey, you there.
Is it true that a great giant fell to the earth
in the White Tree Continent?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that you indeed
defeated the Zu Phagg.

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0021
rows.name:
Confirm if he is talking
about the Zu Phagg.

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0003
rows.name:
You're the one who defeated it?!
That was a great deed, but...
Things have taken a terrible turn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Its name hasn't been passed down...
But if it's a giant like you describe,
then it must be the very giant from the legends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0005
rows.name:
You see, on our planet, there's a legend
passed down from ancient times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0006
rows.name:
"When the great giant falls,
the world will perish and gain new life..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0007
rows.name:
...It's a legend passed down on our home planet,
Tormein, for over ten thousand years.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Even now, there are probably few among the
Tree Clan or the Cavern Clan who remember it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Earthling.
If the legend is true...
This world will perish once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0030
rows.name: Believe

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0031
rows.name: Panic, saying that's terrible.

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0040
rows.name: Disbelieve

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0041
rows.name: State that there's no credibility to such a legend.

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0010
rows.name:
You seem to have a heart that respects the old ways,
which is rare for an Earthling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Regardless, we must prepare for the disaster...
I've currently sent a warrior named Oche
to investigate if there are any anomalies...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hmm...
Thinking ancient words are mere deception
is a very Earthling-like way to think.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0013
rows.name:
Well... I'd prefer it if nothing happened,
just as you say...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0014
rows.name:
But I've got a bad feeling about this...
I've currently sent a warrior named Oche
to investigate if there are any anomalies...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0015
rows.name:
Nimu-sama!!
Beasts are flooding toward this area![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0016
rows.name:
I-I-Is this...!
Is this the ruin of the world Nimu-sama spoke of!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Wh-! What did you say!?
So the disaster is to be brought about
by the sacred beasts![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0018
rows.name:
I've gathered the Bias warriors,
but it won't be nearly enough against a horde that size!
Wh-What should we do, Nimu-sama![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0019
rows.name:
Hmmm... According to the legend, at the time of ruin,
a single youth will appear and become a fragment of hope,
but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Ha!
Could that perhaps be you!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0021
rows.name:
It must be!
Hey, you... Won't you please save the world
from this desperate situation!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0022
rows.name:
That's the spirit of the hero spoken of since ancient times!
Alright... Then head to the battlefield at once...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Haha!
Well now, it sounds like you're talking about
something quite interesting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0024
rows.name:
Wh... You're from the Cavern Clan!!
Why are you in a place like this...!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0025
rows.name:
Don't overflow with so much bloodlust.
I didn't come here to fight you people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Wh... As if I could believe that!
Since the ancient past, how many times do you think
you've deceived us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0027
rows.name:
Leave right now!
Or else... I'll shoot you dead!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0028
rows.name:
Tch... And here I thought I'd help you out,
but I really can't deal with idiots like the Tree Clan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0029
rows.name:
I'll just do whatever I want on my own!
You guys can just get yourselves killed by those things![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0030
rows.name:
...Hmph, as if we need the cooperation of the Cavern Clan!
We'll handle this ourselves![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0031
rows.name:
You, come to the East Gate Plains immediately.
We'll repel the beasts there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0032
rows.name:
Normally, my way is to return a picked fight
a hundredfold, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0033
rows.name:
Hey! You Tree Clan bastard over there!
Right now, it's a huge crisis where the world is going to perish.
We don't have time to squabble over such trivial things![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0034
rows.name:
After this battle is over,
I'll take you on as many times as you want...
So stop whining and let's fight together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0035
rows.name:
...!
Why should I fight alongside you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Hmm.
It seems there is no lie in this Cavern person's words...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0037
rows.name:
Oche, for now, forget your personal grudges
and focus only on repelling the disaster.
Join hands with that person and fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0038
rows.name: But, Nimu-sama...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0039
rows.name:
Hehe! That old man over there seems to be
a slightly more decent Bias!
Alright, now that it's decided, it's war![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0040
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]!
Are you ready too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0041
rows.name:
If you show me a pathetic way of fighting,
I'll kick you from behind![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0051
rows.name: Nod and say you can go anytime.

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0060
rows.name: Refutation

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0061
rows.name:
Retort that you'll beat her up if
she shows a pathetic way of fighting.

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0042
rows.name:
That's right, you're the same as me...
The kind of person whose head is full of brawling![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0043
rows.name:
Hehe! You've got quite the mouth!
I don't hate that part of you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0044
rows.name:
Well then, you two!
We'll intercept them at the East Gate Plains![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0045
rows.name:
Ahaha! It's been a while since I've had a big brawl!
I'll show you the power of Slovity,
feared as the witch of beast-killing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0046
rows.name:
H-Hey, wait! Even I bear the name of
a ferocious beast, Wolfen!
I'll show you the greatness of the Bias![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0047
rows.name:
You must be the fragment of hope passed down
by the ancient legend!
Please... Save this world from ruin![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0048
rows.name:
That's the spirit of the hero spoken of since ancient times!
Alright... Then head to the battlefield at once...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0049
rows.name:
...Haha!
Well now, it sounds like you're talking about
something quite interesting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0050
rows.name:
Wh... You're from the Cavern Clan!!
Why are you in a place like this...!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0051
rows.name:
Don't overflow with so much bloodlust.
I didn't come here to fight you people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0052
rows.name:
Wh... As if I could believe that!
Since the ancient past, how many times do you think
you've deceived us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0053
rows.name:
Leave right now!
Or else... I'll shoot you dead!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0072
rows.name:
Even if that person's words are true,
the Cavern Clan are our enemies of long-standing fate...
We cannot join hands, even in this emergency.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0073
rows.name:
...Ancient hero, head to the East Gate Plains.
And repel this great disaster.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0077
rows.name:
Ah... You've returned to us!
...How was it?
Has the disaster vanished!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0091
rows.name: Report that you were able to repel them.

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0100
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0101
rows.name:
Ask about Oche's whereabouts,
as he is nowhere to be seen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0078
rows.name:
I see...
If so, Oche surely has no regrets.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0079
rows.name:
...Oche died in battle.
However, he died by being eaten by beasts.
For a Bias, there is no death more blissful than that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0080
rows.name:
...Oche died in battle.
However, he died by being eaten by beasts.
For a Bias, there is no death more blissful than that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0081
rows.name:
And... you were victorious, correct?
If so, he surely has no regrets as a warrior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0082
rows.name:
"When the great giant falls,
the world will perish and gain new life..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0083
rows.name:
Hmm... What does this "new life" signify...
Even as a storyteller, I completely fail
to understand its meaning, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0084
rows.name:
The world was able to avoid the fate of ruin.
This is all thanks to you...
Please accept this as a token of our gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0085
rows.name:
It was a close battle... Perhaps...
If we had joined hands with that woman called Slovity,
the casualties might have been fewer...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0086
rows.name:
Say, what would you have done?
Would you have forgotten the disputes between tribes
and joined hands?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0110
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0111
rows.name: Say that you would have joined hands.

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0120
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0121
rows.name:
Say that you would have rejected them
in the same way.

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0087
rows.name:
The broadness of your heart...
Perhaps we must learn a little from it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0088
rows.name:
Yes... The disaster passed down from ancient times
might fall upon us again...
When that time comes, we shall utilize the lesson learned today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0089
rows.name:
Right... It's not so easy for the hatred
lying between our two races to vanish.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0090
rows.name:
...But if Oche died because of that...
Hmm... It's quite a difficult matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0074
rows.name:
Hmm, Slovity, was it?
She's from the Cavern Clan, but... an interesting Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0075
rows.name:
I thought that lot was just a gathering of those
without a righteous cause, but it seems there are
decent ones among them too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0076
rows.name:
...Ancient hero.
Head to the East Gate Plains.
Unite everyone's strength and repel the disaster.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0091
rows.name:
I heard the story from those two!
It seems it was a splendid, overwhelming victory![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0092
rows.name:
Haha!
Well, I defeated twenty more beasts
than that Cavern woman over there did![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0093
rows.name:
What are you talking about!
You only defeated small fry that don't even
count towards the numbers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0094
rows.name:
Try defeating something as strong as a Vasalt
like I did.
Bullying the weak in a brawl is so uncool![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0095
rows.name:
Guh...!
It's true you were strong... I'll admit that.
But the match is my win![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0096
rows.name:
...Warriors are truly a handful, aren't they.
By the way... In your eyes,
which seemed stronger, the Tree or the Cavern?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0130
rows.name: The Tree Clan

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0131
rows.name: Say the Tree Clan was stronger.

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0140
rows.name: The Cavern Clan

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0141
rows.name: Say the Cavern Clan was stronger.

rows.label: qev031501_JNK0150
rows.name: Both

rows.label: qev031501_SEL0151
rows.name: Say you think both were equally strong.

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0097
rows.name:
Wh...! ?
Dammit, hearing that from you
makes me a little depressed...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0098
rows.name:
...Hmph!
In the next battle, I'll show you a decisive difference!
Look forward to it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0099
rows.name:
Yeah!
I'll train more so I won't fall behind
the likes of you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0100
rows.name:
...It's true that in actual ability, I lost this one.
Dammit... But it won't go like this next time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0101
rows.name:
I'll become much, much stronger, and in the next battle,
I'll defeat a stronger beast than you did![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0102
rows.name:
Hehe! I'll look forward to that.
Your fighting style has a lot of wasted movements!
I think you can still get a lot stronger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0103
rows.name:
...Right.
We forgot this during ten thousand years of conflict,
but we are children of the same Tormein...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0104
rows.name:
If these two tribes join hands,
we wouldn't fall behind even the Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0105
rows.name:
"When the great giant falls,
the world will perish and gain new life..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0106
rows.name:
Hehe... Perhaps "new life"
refers to this new bond.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0107
rows.name:
The Tree Clan and the Cavern Clan... and you.
If we all combine our strength, we have nothing to fear
from any disaster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031501_MSG0108
rows.name:
Please accept this.
And then, let us all raise a toast in celebration![ST:wait ]
